summary: Jewellers Block insurance covering jewellery manufacturers, wholesalers, and retailers for stock, display, transit, and customers' items. All-risks basis with specific exclusions for mysterious disappearance and employee dishonesty threshold.

schemaEntities.description: Jeweller risk entity. Custom: TradeType, TIV_Stock, DiamondGrade, HallmarkingFlag, SafeType, VaultGrade, AlarmStandard, SecuritySurveyDate, AntiSocial_History.
65 rules: safe and vault grade requirements by stock value band, alarm standard compliance (NSI Gold), transit carrier approval, display limit ratios, diamond value maximum schedules.

relationships.note: Stock limit and security requirements driven by TIV and safe/vault grade
NSI Gold alarm standard and safe grade rules are limit-gating controls

migrationIssues.detail: Safe and vault grade-based limit gating rules. GW Cloud underwriting rules support grade-based limits -- security classification TypeKey migration required.
NSI Gold / SSAIB alarm certificate validation required above threshold. External NSI register integration required -- no GW Cloud native security industry integration.
Individual diamond schedule above value threshold. GW Cloud schedule item entity supports -- configuration work for diamond-specific fields.
Approved carrier list for high-value transit. GW Cloud carrier validation supports list-based approval -- configuration migration.

cloudMapping.action: Generic alarm grade -- NSI Gold-specific TypeKey and validation rule migration required
TypeKey migration required -- safe grade classification list
NSI/SSAIB alarm certificate validation API integration required
